case_number: Criminal Bail Application is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 749 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application. 22.11.2024 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
